dict.string: Fuelsense uses motion activity data to detect driving behavior and trip status for accurate vehicle tracking and journey monitoring.
Fuelsense collects location data while the app is in use to track vehicle movement and monitor trips in real time.
Fuelsense collects location data in the background to continuously track vehicles and monitor trips, even when the app is closed or not actively in use.
Fuelsense requires access to location data at all times to ensure uninterrupted vehicle tracking and journey monitoring, even when the app is not open.
Fuelsense uses Bluetooth to communicate with nearby devices for enabling trip detection, vehicle diagnostics, and seamless in-vehicle connectivity — even when the app is running in the background..
Fuelsense uses Bluetooth to discover and connect to nearby vehicle devices for enhanced trip tracking, diagnostics, and automation — even when the app is running in the background.
$(PRODUCT_NAME) needs permission to access camera on your device.
$(PRODUCT_NAME) needs permission to access photos on your device.
$(PRODUCT_NAME) needs permission to save images to your photo library.
